summary: Labour Count tab redesign fully tested. All backend APIs (6/6) and frontend UI elements working correctly. Contractor list shows assigned contractors with type badge and labour count. Clicking contractor opens attendance form with pre-filled rates (set by Planning). Attendance summary shows day-by-day with breakdown. Work order stages timeline shows: completed (green), open/requested (amber with Payment Requested badge), upcoming (low opacity, just title). Raise Payment button sends request and updates stage status.
critical_code_review_comments: All data-testid attributes correctly implemented for contractor cards, attendance form, summary table, and stage timeline
Auto-cost calculation (rate × count) working correctly in both backend and frontend
Stage timeline properly displays: open (blue with Raise Payment), requested (amber with Payment Requested badge), upcoming (low opacity)
Backend correctly blocks duplicate payment requests (returns 400 when stage already requested)
seed_data_creation: Used existing test data: 3 contractors assigned to proj_12f23331b542 (Raju Painters, Kumar Masonry Works, TEST_Contractor_034523) with pre-set labour_rates and work orders with payment stages.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Labour Count tab redesign fully tested at /site-engineer/project/proj_12f23331b542. Key findings: (1) GET /api/projects/{project_id}/assigned-contractors returns contractors with labour_rates (type/label/rate) and work_orders with payment_stages. (2) Clicking contractor opens attendance form with pre-filled rates, SE enters counts only. (3) POST /api/labour-attendance auto-calculates total_cost from entries (count × per_day_cost). (4) Attendance summary table shows date, day, workers, breakdown (type × rate = total), grand total. (5) Work order stages timeline: completed=green, open=blue with 'Raise Payment Request' button, requested=amber with 'Payment Requested' badge, upcoming=low opacity (just title). (6) PATCH /api/labour-work-orders/{wo_id}/stages/{stage_id}/request-payment changes stage status to 'requested'.

backend_apis.GET /api/projects/{project_id}/assigned-: PASS - Returns contractors with labour_rates and work_orders
backend_apis.POST /api/contractors with labour_rates: PASS - Accepts labour_rates field with type/label/rate objects
backend_apis.POST /api/labour-attendance: PASS - Saves attendance with contractor_id and auto-calculates cost
backend_apis.GET /api/labour-attendance with contract: PASS - Returns attendance entries for specific contractor

frontend_ui.Contractor card: PASS - data-testid='contractor-card-{id}' with type badge and labour count
frontend_ui.Back button: PASS - data-testid='back-to-contractors' returns to contractor list
frontend_ui.Summary row: PASS - data-testid='summary-row-{date}' shows breakdown (type × rate = total)
frontend_ui.Grand total row: PASS - Shows sum of all attendance entries
frontend_ui.Work order card: PASS - data-testid='work-order-{id}' with description and total amount
frontend_ui.Open stage (pending): PASS - Blue background with 'Raise Payment Request' button
frontend_ui.Requested stage: PASS - Amber background with 'Payment Requested' badge, shows requested amount
frontend_ui.Upcoming stages: PASS - Low opacity, shows just stage title
